name: Molded Turkey-Pineapple Salad
recipeIngredient: ¼ cup chopped sweet red pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the gelatin in ¼ cup of pineapple juice and let set for 5 minutes.
2. Boil the chicken broth and pour it over the gelatin. Stir to dissolve.
3. Add the remaining pineapple juice and chill until thickened.
4. In a bowl, combine the remaining ingredients.
5. Pour the gelatin mixture over the turkey and transfer into a 9 × 5‑inch loaf pan.
6. Refrigerate overnight or at least 4 hours. Cut into squares and serve on lettuce.
(Note: This recipe is based on the original text provided.)
